title: MailerLite vs AWeber (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare MailerLite vs AWeber. See pricing, features, ratings, and which email marketing tool wins for your business.
intro: Both MailerLite and AWeber are established email marketing platforms offering freemium models ideal for small businesses and creators. This comparison examines their pricing, features, and overall value to help you choose the right tool for your email marketing needs.
choose_a_if: You need a generous free tier with up to 1,000 subscribers at no cost
You run an e-commerce business and want built-in product integrations
You want a modern drag-and-drop editor and pop-up builder for campaigns
choose_b_if: You're a blogger who needs RSS-to-email functionality
You prefer a platform with longer track record (founded in 1998)
You need advanced autoresponder and tagging capabilities for segmentation

faq.a: MailerLite edges ahead with better ratings (4.6 vs 4.2 on G2), more generous free tier (1,000 vs 500 subscribers), and superior e-commerce features. However, AWeber remains solid for bloggers needing RSS-to-email functionality and has deeper industry experience since 1998.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, MailerLite or AWeber?
faq.a: MailerLite is cheaper with paid plans starting at $9/month compared to AWeber's $15/month. Additionally, MailerLite's free tier supports twice as many subscribers (1,000 vs 500), making it the more budget-friendly choice overall.

faq.q: Can I switch from AWeber to MailerLite?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms allow you to export your subscriber lists and import them into MailerLite. Most migrations are straightforward, though you'll need to manually recreate campaigns and automations. Both platforms offer support to help guide the transition process.
